title: astragalus peltatus
intro: Astragalus peltatus, also known as mountain milkvetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family, native to Europe and western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, with potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The health benefits of Astragalus peltatus include its ability to help the body cope with stress, lower blood pressure, and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, Astragalus peltatus is often made into a tea, tincture, or supplement, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
